input.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

raw.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

winner: Why don't frost flowers ever play hide and seek? Because with one touch, they disappear... right in front of your eyes!

candidates.text: Why don't frost flowers ever play hide and seek? Because with one touch, they disappear... right in front of your eyes!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'disappear' and 'hide and seek,' ties directly to the headline, concise, and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why are frost flowers always so hard to keep in a relationship? Because with one touch, they vanish!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'vanish' from the headline, concise and surprising twist with a play on relationships"}

candidates.text: Why don't frost flowers ever forget their phone numbers? Because they always dial-a-blizzard!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the pun on 'dial-a-blizzard,' but it lacks strong specificity to the topic of frost flowers and feels a bit forced."}

candidates.text: A magician, a butler, and a gardener walk into a greenhouse... The frost flower vanished with just one touch by the gardener. He must have been practicing his new ice-touching illusion all winter.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks strong surprise or specificity. The setup with the magician and butler feels generic, and the connection to frost flowers isn't tightly woven into the punchline."}

candidates.text: When asked if he could make anything disappear, the magician replied, "I can't... I'm more of a 'frost flower' kind of magician.
